title: B@thuw'el #1328
definition:
Bethuel = "God destroys" or "man of God" or "dweller in God"

 n pr m
 1) nephew of Abraham, son of Nahor by Milcah, father of Rebekah

 n pr loc
 2) a town of Simeon in the south
nasbUsage:
Definition: Bethuel = "God destroys" or "man of God" or "dweller in God"

 n pr m
 1) nephew of Abraham, son of Nahor by Milcah, father of Rebekah

 n pr loc
 2) a town of Simeon in the south

    NASB:  perh. man of God, a nephew of Abraham
